item.title: Iran war: Trump's pattern of setting unenforced deadlines
item.description: This time around, the president did not provide a new deadline for how long the ceasefire extension will last.

item.title: WATCH: New Nat Geo doc highlights alarming decline of the honeybee
item.description: The new National Geographic documentary “Secret of the Bees” offers a glimpse into the world and importance of bees.

item.title: D4vd murder case: Medical examiner report released on teen's cause of death
item.description: D4vd has been charged with first-degree murder in connection with the death of the teen, Celeste Rivas Hernandez, officials said.

item.title: Georgia Democratic Rep. David Scott dies at 80
item.description: Scott served in the House for more than 23 years.

item.title: WATCH: Baby elephant makes debut on Earth Day
item.description: The elephant calf made her public debut as the first Asian elephant born at the National Zoo in more than 25 years.
